stale.reason: Letta 0.16.8 installed successfully in an isolated 241-package environment after moving off the constrained /tmp filesystem and adding its undeclared asyncpg runtime dependency. A 20-row smoke still executed zero rows: both the public `letta server` CLI and documented `start_server` path reached application startup, but the maintenance-mode V1 server lifespan initialized an async PostgreSQL engine and attempted localhost:5432 even though isolated settings reported DatabaseChoice.SQLITE and the sqlite extra was installed. The final scrubbed direct startup failed with asyncpg connection refused on ::1/127.0.0.1:5432. No PostgreSQL service was provisioned, no public memory row completed, and no result was simulated.
